intraday.summary: Geopolitical tensions likely to escalate into close with oil shock fears driving risk-off rotation. IWM weakness and defensive positioning in mega-cap tech options suggest institutional de-risking ahead of potential Iran developments.
intraday.key_driver: US-Iran escalation fears triggering defensive positioning

next_day.summary: Oil shock narrative likely to dominate with G7 reserve releases insufficient to calm markets. Risk-off sentiment should persist with small caps leading declines while defensive mega-caps show relative strength.
next_day.key_driver: Oil price shock and stagflation fears reversing rate cut expectations

long_term.summary: Deep ITM call buying in tech giants suggests institutional confidence in 30-day horizon despite near-term risks. Geopolitical tensions likely to normalize but stagflation concerns may cap upside.
long_term.key_driver: Institutional tech accumulation offsetting macro headwinds

news_impact: Iran war headlines and oil shock fears dominating sentiment. G7 emergency reserves release signals severity of supply concerns. Stagflation narrative gaining traction with rate cut reversal fears. Tech earnings transcripts show cautious tone offsetting AI optimism.
options_flow_impact: Neutral PC ratio masks divergent positioning - massive deep ITM call buying in tech leaders (NVDA, TSLA, META) suggests institutional accumulation for 30+ day horizon while near-term expiry flow shows defensive positioning. MSFT deep ITM puts notable bearish outlier.
risks: Iran military escalation triggering oil spike above $100
Stagflation forcing Fed to maintain restrictive policy
Tech valuations vulnerable to rate shock despite AI narrative
